info.title: Shop Admin API
info.description: API for Shop Admin Management System

post.description: Register a new user account with email and password (validation: name required max:255, email required unique, password required min:8 confirmed)

password.description: Password must be at least 8 characters

422.description: Validation error: invalid email, password too short, email already exists, or passwords don't match

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password to receive JWT token (validation: email required valid format, password required min:8)

422.description: Validation error: invalid email format or password too short

get.description: Get paginated list of categories with optional search

post.description: Create a new category (Admin only). Validation: name required min:3 max:100 unique, description nullable string

422.description: Validation error (name already exists or invalid format)

get.description: Retrieve a single category by ID

patch.description: Update a category (Admin only). Validation: name required min:3 max:100 unique (except current), description nullable string

get.description: Get soft deleted categories with pagination (Admin only)

patch.description: Restore a soft deleted category (Admin only)

delete.description: Permanently delete a category (cannot be restored, Admin only)

get.summary: List orders belonging to authenticated user
get.description: Retrieve paginated list of orders for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new order for authenticated user with items array. Requires items array with min:1, each item requires product_id (must exist) and quantity (min:1)

product_id.description: Valid product ID that exists in database

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific order belonging to the authenticated user

404.description: Order not found or does not belong to user

get.description: Get paginated list of products with optional search and category filtering

post.description: Create a new product (Admin only). Validation: name required max:255, price required numeric min:0, category_id nullable exists:categories, image nullable mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif max:2048

image.description: Image file (jpeg, png, jpg, gif, max 2MB)

get.description: Retrieve a single product by ID or slug

patch.description: Update product details (Admin only). Validation same as create

get.description: Get soft deleted products with pagination (Admin only)

patch.description: Restore a soft deleted product (Admin only)

delete.description: Permanently delete a product (cannot be restored, Admin only)

post.description: Export products to CSV or Excel format with optional filtering (Admin only, async job, returns 202 Accepted)

message.example: Export job queued. You will receive an email with the download link shortly.

get.description: Download an exported product file (CSV or XLSX)
Get the authenticated user's profile information

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information including bio and profile image

delete.description: Delete the authenticated user's profile image

get.description: Get paginated list of users with optional search (Admin only)

post.description: Create a new user (Admin only). Validation: name required max:255, email required unique, password required min:6 confirmed, role required in:admin,user

get.description: Get a single user's information (Admin only)

patch.description: Update user information (Admin only). Validation: email unique except current, password optional min:6

password.description: Optional, only provided if changing password

patch.description: Restore a soft deleted user (Admin only)

delete.description: Permanently delete a user from database (Admin only)

bearerAuth.description: Enter your Bearer token in the format: Bearer {token}
